service_group: Outsourced Accounting, Digital Accounting and Monthly Bookkeeping

services.name: Accounting Outsourcing
services.description: Outsourced accounting services for SMEs that want to reduce administrative cost and avoid hiring an internal accountant.

services.name: Monthly Accounting Package for Microenterprises
services.description: Fixed monthly accounting packages for Romanian microenterprises, including current accounting, tax declarations and basic advisory.

services.name: Legal Tax Optimization
services.description: Legal tax optimization advisory for SMEs based on revenue, expenses, shareholder remuneration and supplier contracts.

services.name: Digital Accounting Provider Comparison
services.description: Comparison between the current accounting provider and a more digitalized accounting workflow.

services.name: Integrated Accounting, Payroll and Annual Reporting Package
services.description: Integrated accounting package covering monthly bookkeeping, payroll and annual financial statements.

services.name: Monthly Bookkeeping for Small SRLs
services.description: Monthly bookkeeping for Romanian SRLs with 1 to 10 employees, including invoices, bank statements, reconciliations and tax declarations.

services.name: Accounting Cleanup and Reorganization
services.description: Cleanup and reorganization of messy accounting records according to Romanian accounting rules.

services.name: Accounting Software Migration
services.description: Migration from Excel to integrated accounting software, including data structure, import and workflow setup.

services.name: Cloud Accounting
services.description: Cloud accounting workflows that provide secure real-time access to financial information and basic indicators.

services.name: Accounts Receivable and Payable Management
services.description: Management of customer and supplier ledgers, overdue invoices, receivables, payables and cash-flow visibility.
